name: Secret of Vibranium Alloys
uniques: [+50]% Strength for cities <when defending>
[+25]% Strength <for [All] units>
[+66]% Strength <for [All] units> <vs [Ranged] units> <when defending>
Provides [2] [Iron]
[+100]% [Strategic] resource production
Only available <if [Sacred Mound] is constructed>
Will not be displayed in Civilopedia
quote: 'The most versatile substance on the planet, and they used it to build a Frisbee.' - Ultron

name: Sacred Mound
uniques: Provides [1] [Vibranium]
[+5 Culture, +2 Science, +2 Happiness, +2 Faith, +2 Gold, +2 Food, +2 Production] [in all cities]
[+2 Science, +2 Production] from [All Road] tiles [in all cities]
[+2 Gold, +2 Food] from [Farm] tiles [in all cities]
[+3 Gold, +3 Production] from [Mine] tiles [in all cities]
[+200]% Production towards any buildings that already exist in the Capital
Free [Black Panther] appears
Gain a free [Monument] [in this city]
Automatically built in all cities where it is buildable
quote: 'I have seen gods fly. I have seen men build weapons that I couldn't even imagine. I have seen aliens drop from the sky. But I have never seen anything like this.' - Everett K. Ross

name: Secret of Enlightened Culture
uniques: Each city founded increases culture cost of policies [50]% less than normal
[-40]% Unhappiness from [Population] [in all cities]
[+5 Culture, +5 Science, +5 Happiness] from each Trade Route
All newly-trained [Military] units [in all cities] receive the [March] promotion
All newly-trained [{non-[Air]} {Military}] units [in all cities] receive the [Furinkazan] promotion
All newly-trained [Land] units [in all cities] receive the [Ignore terrain cost] promotion
Only available <if [Sacred Mound] is constructed>
Will not be displayed in Civilopedia
quote: 'You have been told that the might of your country is in its wonderful invention, in its circuits and weaponry. This is the mastery of things. But Wakanda was great before it had things, and its secrets are older than any vaulted metal.' - Ramonda
